item.title: How Did the Pen Stay Floating?
item.description: A creative trick clip featuring a baseball bat flip and a floating pen effect, captured without visible strings, edits, or special attachments. A fun moment of timing and coordination.

media:content.media:title: How Did the Pen Stay Floating?
media:content.media:description: A creative trick clip featuring a baseball bat flip and a floating pen effect, captured without visible strings, edits, or special attachments. A fun moment of timing and coordination.

media:content.media:description: A dance routine featuring a double flip, shared by DrTim.

item.title: Bat trick routines highlight coordination practice
item.description: Quick bat spins, smooth catches, and clean transitions showcase a creative baseball bat trick routine focused on coordination and control practice.

media:content.media:title: Bat trick routines highlight coordination practice
media:content.media:description: Quick bat spins, smooth catches, and clean transitions showcase a creative baseball bat trick routine focused on coordination and control practice.

item.title: How about 3 in a row? That was hard!
item.description: Taking on a tricky three-in-a-row challenge.
